name: auto_detect_xpm
short_description: Auto detect the XPM Libraries that are used in the design and set the XPM_LIBRARIES project property.
full_help:
auto_detect_xpm

Description: 
Auto detect the XPM Libraries that are used in the design and set the XPM_LIBRARIES project property.

Syntax: 
auto_detect_xpm  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
FileIO, Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
